descFull: A local OpenAI- and Anthropic-compatible proxy that brings your Claude Pro/Max subscription to Cursor, Cline, Aider, and the Agent SDK. Session-affinity routing, multi-account pooling, and live drift detection keep long agent runs stable across tools.
